name: directional-punch-controls
description: Verify independent up/down punch controls, one-second attack cadence, character action motion, and non-overlapping action UI.

args.code: local a=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] a:Invoke('Reset') a:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=250,WallLevel=99}) local hrp=p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') hrp.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-27),Vector3.new(-2,3,-80)) return 'POSITIONED'

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local up=p:GetAttribute('LastPunchDirection') task.wait(.75) local hrp=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart hrp.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-27),Vector3.new(-2,3,-80)) return H:JSONEncode({ok=up=='Up',direction=up,interval=workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetAttribute('PunchAttackInterval')})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local h=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local up=h:FindFirstChild('PunchUp') local down=h:FindFirstChild('PunchDown') local nextCard=h:FindFirstChild('NextWorldCard') local function overlap(a,b) local ap,as,bp,bs=a.AbsolutePosition,a.AbsoluteSize,b.AbsolutePosition,b.AbsoluteSize return ap.X<bp.X+bs.X and ap.X+as.X>bp.X and ap.Y<bp.Y+bs.Y and ap.Y+as.Y>bp.Y end return H:JSONEncode({ok=up~=nil and down~=nil and up.Active and down.Active and not overlap(up,down) and not overlap(up,nextCard) and not overlap(down,nextCard) and (g:GetAttribute('CharacterPunchCount') or 0)>=2,count=g:GetAttribute('CharacterPunchCount') or 0,upDirection=up and up:GetAttribute('PunchDirection'),downDirection=down and down:GetAttribute('PunchDirection')})
